mapper.select: SELECT id, biz_type, biz_action, biz_order_id, biz_item_id, warehouse_id, location_id, material_id, effective_quantity, area_coefficient_snapshot, area_delta, direction, validation_mode, skip_reason, reversed_ledger_id, org_id, tenant_id, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM wms_location_area_ledger WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_action = #{bizAction} AND biz_order_id = #{bizOrderId} AND biz_item_id = #{bizItemId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, biz_type, biz_action, biz_order_id, biz_item_id, warehouse_id, location_id, material_id, effective_quantity, area_coefficient_snapshot, area_delta, direction, validation_mode, skip_reason, reversed_ledger_id, org_id, tenant_id, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM wms_location_area_ledger WHERE location_id = #{locationId} AND material_id = #{materialId} AND reversed_ledger_id IS NULL AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_location_area_ledger SET reversed_ledger_id = #{reversedLedgerId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{ledgerId} AND deleted = 0
